visual_description: In a dimly lit, intimate close-up, an older man with thinning, reddish-brown hair and a young boy with messy, platinum-blonde hair are shown. The boy's face is filled with tears, his expression one of deep sadness and distress. The man, wearing a dark shirt, leans in close, his face near the boy's, as if speaking to him with great care and concern. The background is dark and out of focus, keeping the attention solely on the emotional exchange between the two. The camera remains steady, capturing the raw emotion of the moment. A man speaks in a low, gentle, and deeply comforting voice, filled with a quiet urgency. "Please, TJ, listen to me," he pleads softly. The boy, TJ, can be heard sniffling and crying softly in the background, his sobs conveying immense sadness. The man continues in the same soothing, reassuring tone, "He's gone. He's gone, son." The audio is intimate and focused solely on their voices, with no background music, emphasizing the raw emotion of the moment.
